alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices & Services with two promotions; led scaling of global commercial operations and transformation programs; deep experience with end-to-end program ownership and roadmap definition
alignments.job_requirement: Define and own the end-to-end transformation roadmap for Finance, covering both systems and processes

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led transformation programs at scale; experience with process requirements logic, design, UAT, and rollout across global teams; proven ability to balance efficiency with control
alignments.job_requirement: Redesign core finance processes (procure-to-pay, order-to-cash, record-to-report, FP&A) by increasing efficiency, control, and scalability

alignments.candidate_evidence: Transformed global commercial operations at Google; demonstrated ability to drive organizational change and enable teams; experience scaling operations across multiple regions
alignments.job_requirement: Lead change management and upskilling initiatives to enable adoption of new tools and processes across global finance teams

alignments.candidate_evidence: Limited direct hands-on experience with ERP systems (SAP, Oracle, Netsuite) or ML-based automation tools; experience is primarily in requirements definition, process design, and implementation management rather than deep technical systems architecture
alignments.job_requirement: Partner with Finance, Technology, and Business teams to evaluate, select, and implement systems and automation solutions (ERP, AI, workflow tools)

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategic and Operations leader with founder-like ownership mentality; track record of shaping operations at scale; can operate at senior stakeholder level
alignments.job_requirement: Serve as strategic advisor to the broader leadership team on how to elevate Finance into a competitive advantage

alignments.candidate_evidence: Two promotions at Google; experience operating in complex, high-stakes transformation environments; comfortable with ambiguity and senior stakeholder engagement
alignments.job_requirement: Reporting directly to the Head of Strategic Finance; high-visibility, ambiguous, high-growth context

gaps.gap: No hands-on experience with enterprise finance systems (SAP, Oracle, Netsuite) or ML-based reconciliation tools
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's strength in systems architecture, process design, and buy-vs-build evaluation can transfer; systems training ramps quickly for someone with transformation domain expertise; vendor partnerships and tech team support are standard in L5+ roles

gaps.gap: Limited top-tier management consulting or systems integration background
gaps.mitigation: Candidate brings product transformation mindset, iterative delivery discipline, and vendor evaluation skills from Google; consulting exposure is preferred, not minimum; operating model design is transferable

gaps.gap: No stated direct IPO readiness or SOX compliance program experience
gaps.mitigation: IPO controls and compliance are learnable; candidate's track record of building scalable, auditable processes provides foundation; mentorship from Head of Strategic Finance and Finance leadership team available

output.level_rationale: Role requires 6+ years with proven architecture and transformation leadership; reports to Head of Strategic Finance (senior stakeholder); scope spans global finance systems and organizational change (established ownership). Aligns with L5 senior IC or lead level.
output.summary: Strong strategic and transformation fit with eight years of Google operations leadership and proven end-to-end program ownership. Core gaps: no direct enterprise finance systems (ERP/ML tools) hands-on experience and limited consulting background. Candidate's process architecture, change leadership, and stakeholder influence are substantial strengths; systems expertise and IPO/SOX depth are manageable ramp areas. Role sits at L5, within target band; recommend consideration with focus on systems mentoring and vendor partnership model.
uncertainties: Airwallex company stage/size context not stated; valued at $8B but team size (2,200+) and maturity are not typical of early-stage startup, affecting interpretation of 'IPO-ready' timeline urgency
Depth of candidate's ERP evaluation experience not detailed; prefer clarification on SAP/Oracle/Netsuite familiarity during screen
No detail on candidate's direct ML/AI automation tool experience; clarify exposure to workflow automation and reconciliation tooling
